title: CVE-2026-33751 - n8n Vulnerable to LDAP Filter Injection in LDAP Node

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - CVE-2026-33751 - n8n Vulnerable to LDAP Filter Injection in 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/28
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*n8n-nodes-base.ldap*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
